CVE-2020-10177.title: Pillow before 7.1.0 has multiple out-of-bounds reads in libImagin ...
CVE-2020-10177.summary: Pillow before 7.1.0 has multiple out-of-bounds reads in libImaging/FliDecode.c.

CVE-2020-10378.title: In libImaging/PcxDecode.c in Pillow before 7.1.0, an out-of-bound ...
CVE-2020-10378.summary: In libImaging/PcxDecode.c in Pillow before 7.1.0, an out-of-bounds read can occur when reading PCX files where state->shuffle is instructed to read beyond state->buffer.

CVE-2020-10379.title: In Pillow before 7.1.0, there are two Buffer Overflows in libImag ...
CVE-2020-10379.summary: In Pillow before 7.1.0, there are two Buffer Overflows in libImaging/TiffDecode.c.

CVE-2020-10994.title: In libImaging/Jpeg2KDecode.c in Pillow before 7.1.0, there are mu ...
CVE-2020-10994.summary: In libImaging/Jpeg2KDecode.c in Pillow before 7.1.0, there are multiple out-of-bounds reads via a crafted JP2 file.

CVE-2020-11538.title: In libImaging/SgiRleDecode.c in Pillow through 7.0.0, a number of ...
CVE-2020-11538.summary: In libImaging/SgiRleDecode.c in Pillow through 7.0.0, a number of out-of-bounds reads exist in the parsing of SGI image files, a different issue than CVE-2020-5311.

CVE-2020-35653.title: In Pillow before 8.1.0, PcxDecode has a buffer over-read when dec ...
CVE-2020-35653.summary: In Pillow before 8.1.0, PcxDecode has a buffer over-read when decoding a crafted PCX file because the user-supplied stride value is trusted for buffer calculations.

CVE-2020-35654.title: In Pillow before 8.1.0, TiffDecode has a heap-based buffer overfl ...
CVE-2020-35654.summary: In Pillow before 8.1.0, TiffDecode has a heap-based buffer overflow when decoding crafted YCbCr files because of certain interpretation conflicts with LibTIFF in RGBA mode.

CVE-2020-35655.title: In Pillow before 8.1.0, SGIRleDecode has a 4-byte buffer over-rea ...
CVE-2020-35655.summary: In Pillow before 8.1.0, SGIRleDecode has a 4-byte buffer over-read when decoding crafted SGI RLE image files because offsets and length tables are mishandled.

CVE-2021-23437.title: The package pillow 5.2.0 and before 8.3.2 are vulnerable to Regul ...
CVE-2021-23437.summary: The package pillow 5.2.0 and before 8.3.2 are vulnerable to Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) via the getrgb function.

CVE-2021-25287.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. There is an out-o ...
CVE-2021-25287.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. There is an out-of-bounds read in J2kDecode, in j2ku_graya_la.

CVE-2021-25288.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. There is an out-o ...
CVE-2021-25288.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. There is an out-of-bounds read in J2kDecode, in j2ku_gray_i.

CVE-2021-25289.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. TiffDecode has a  ...
CVE-2021-25289.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. TiffDecode has a heap-based buffer overflow when decoding crafted YCbCr files because of certain interpretation conflicts with LibTIFF in RGBA mode. NOTE: this issue exists because of an incomplete fix for CVE-2020-35654.

CVE-2021-25290.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. In TiffDecode.c,  ...
CVE-2021-25290.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. In TiffDecode.c, there is a negative-offset memcpy with an invalid size.

CVE-2021-25291.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. In TiffDecode.c,  ...
CVE-2021-25291.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. In TiffDecode.c, there is an out-of-bounds read in TiffreadRGBATile via invalid tile boundaries.

CVE-2021-25292.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. The PDF parser al ...
CVE-2021-25292.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. The PDF parser allows a regular expression DoS (ReDoS) attack via a crafted PDF file because of a catastrophic backtracking regex.

CVE-2021-25293.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. There is an out-o ...
CVE-2021-25293.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.1.1. There is an out-of-bounds read in SGIRleDecode.c.

CVE-2021-27921.title: Pillow before 8.1.2 allows attackers to cause a denial of service ...
CVE-2021-27921.summary: Pillow before 8.1.2 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (memory consumption) because the reported size of a contained image is not properly checked for a BLP container, and thus an attempted memory allocation can be very large.

CVE-2021-27922.title: Pillow before 8.1.2 allows attackers to cause a denial of service ...
CVE-2021-27922.summary: Pillow before 8.1.2 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (memory consumption) because the reported size of a contained image is not properly checked for an ICNS container, and thus an attempted memory allocation can be very large.

CVE-2021-27923.title: Pillow before 8.1.2 allows attackers to cause a denial of service ...
CVE-2021-27923.summary: Pillow before 8.1.2 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (memory consumption) because the reported size of a contained image is not properly checked for an ICO container, and thus an attempted memory allocation can be very large.

CVE-2021-28675.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. PSDImagePlugin.Ps ...
CVE-2021-28675.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. PSDImagePlugin.PsdImageFile lacked a sanity check on the number of input layers relative to the size of the data block. This could lead to a DoS on Image.open prior to Image.load.

CVE-2021-28676.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. For FLI data, Fli ...
CVE-2021-28676.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. For FLI data, FliDecode did not properly check that the block advance was non-zero, potentially leading to an infinite loop on load.

CVE-2021-28677.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. For EPS data, the ...
CVE-2021-28677.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. For EPS data, the readline implementation used in EPSImageFile has to deal with any combination of \r and \n as line endings. It used an accidentally quadratic method of accumulating lines while looking for a line ending. A malicious EPS file could use this to perform a DoS of Pillow in the open phase, before an image was accepted for opening.

CVE-2021-28678.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. For BLP data, Blp ...
CVE-2021-28678.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 8.2.0. For BLP data, BlpImagePlugin did not properly check that reads (after jumping to file offsets) returned data. This could lead to a DoS where the decoder could be run a large number of times on empty data.

CVE-2021-34552.title: Pillow through 8.2.0 and PIL (aka Python Imaging Library) through ...
CVE-2021-34552.summary: Pillow through 8.2.0 and PIL (aka Python Imaging Library) through 1.1.7 allow an attacker to pass controlled parameters directly into a convert function to trigger a buffer overflow in Convert.c.

CVE-2022-22815.title: path_getbbox in path.c in Pillow before 9.0.0 improperly initiali ...
CVE-2022-22815.summary: path_getbbox in path.c in Pillow before 9.0.0 improperly initializes ImagePath.Path.

CVE-2022-22816.title: path_getbbox in path.c in Pillow before 9.0.0 has a buffer over-r ...
CVE-2022-22816.summary: path_getbbox in path.c in Pillow before 9.0.0 has a buffer over-read during initialization of ImagePath.Path.

CVE-2022-22817.title: PIL.ImageMath.eval in Pillow before 9.0.0 allows evaluation of ar ...
CVE-2022-22817.summary: PIL.ImageMath.eval in Pillow before 9.0.0 allows evaluation of arbitrary expressions, such as ones that use the Python exec method. A lambda expression could also be used.

CVE-2022-24303.title: Pillow before 9.0.1 allows attackers to delete files because spac ...
CVE-2022-24303.summary: Pillow before 9.0.1 allows attackers to delete files because spaces in temporary pathnames are mishandled.

CVE-2022-45198.title: Pillow before 9.2.0 performs Improper Handling of Highly Compress ...
CVE-2022-45198.summary: Pillow before 9.2.0 performs Improper Handling of Highly Compressed GIF Data (Data Amplification).

CVE-2023-44271.title: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 10.0.0. It is a Denial o ...
CVE-2023-44271.summary: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 10.0.0. It is a Denial of Service that uncontrollably allocates memory to process a given task, potentially causing a service to crash by having it run out of memory. This occurs for truetype in ImageFont when textlength in an ImageDraw instance operates on a long text argument.

CVE-2023-50447.title: Pillow through 10.1.0 allows PIL.ImageMath.eval Arbitrary Code Ex ...
CVE-2023-50447.summary: Pillow through 10.1.0 allows PIL.ImageMath.eval Arbitrary Code Execution via the environment parameter, a different vulnerability than CVE-2022-22817 (which was about the expression parameter).

CVE-2024-28219.title: In _imagingcms.c in Pillow before 10.3.0, a buffer overflow exist ...
CVE-2024-28219.summary: In _imagingcms.c in Pillow before 10.3.0, a buffer overflow exists because strcpy is used instead of strncpy.
